WingsofIguazuPayoutAndRulesShared.WildDescription: Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols except Scatter Symbol.
WingsofIguazuPayoutAndRulesShared.WildDescription2: Wild symbol appears on reel 2 only.
WingsofIguazuPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyPrizeSymbol1: During any main game spin, whenever 1 or more Blue Macaw symbols appear on the reels, the multiplier will be increased by 2 for each Blue Macaw symbol before wins are paid.
WingsofIguazuPayoutAndRulesShared.FreeSpinDesc1: 3 Scatter symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 10 free spins.
WingsofIguazuPayoutAndRulesShared.FreeSpinDesc2: During the Free Spins Feature, the first and third reel will share the same symbols.
WingsofIguazuPayoutAndRulesShared.FreeSpinDesc3: At the start of the Free Spins Feature, the win multiplier is x2.
WingsofIguazuPayoutAndRulesShared.FreeSpinDesc4: During any free spin, whenever 1 or more Blue Macaw symbols appear on the reels, the multiplier will be increased by 2 for each Blue Macaw symbol before wins are paid.
WingsofIguazuPayoutAndRulesShared.FreeSpinDesc5: Any collected multipliers during the free spin will remain until the end of the Free Spins Feature.
WingsofIguazuPayoutAndRulesShared.FreeSpinDesc6: 3 Scatter symbols appearing anywhere during the Free Spins Feature will award 5 more free spins.

BodyMaximumWin1.value: The maximum win amount is %{2000}x of the bet amount.
BodyMaximumWin1.comment: %{2000} is number that needs to be formatted
BodyMaximumWin1.example: The maximum win amount is 2,000x of the bet amount.

WingsofIguazuPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyMaximumWin2: If the total win in the main game or the Free Spins Feature reaches %{2000}x of the bet amount, the spin ends.

WingsofIguazuRules.GeneralRules1: Wings of Iguazu is a 3-reel (3 rows in reels 1 and 3, and 4 rows in reel 2) video slot featuring Blue Macaw symbol multiplier.

GeneralRules2.value: The game is played with 10 bet lines (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
GeneralRules2.comment: %{minBetMtp}, %{maxBetMtp}, %{minChip}, %{maxChip} will be minimum bet level, maximum max level, minimum bet size and maximum bet size in numeric form.
GeneralRules2.example: The game is played with 10 bet lines (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of 0.05 to 50.

WingsofIguazuRules.GeneralRulesFreeSpin: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.
